name: vinuni_calendar_list_mode
description: Phase 1.27b list-mode: multi-ROW calendar questions ('all X deadlines for the year') that exercise the deterministic calendar aggregation (structured_lookup._match_calendar with list_mode → ALL matching events, not the single point match). Each lists BOTH of the year's deadlines of one type in required_facts (real AY2026-27 dates), with the OTHER deadline type's dates as forbidden_facts so a wrong-type or partial/single answer fails. Added with the feature per the 'golden cases with features' rule; measures the calendar list-mode gain (these MISS the point path when the flag is off).

cases.question: What are all the Add/Transfer Credit deadlines in the 2026-2027 academic year?
Liệt kê tất cả các hạn chót Add/Transfer Credit trong năm học 2026-2027.
List all course drop deadlines for the 2026-2027 academic year.
Liệt kê tất cả các hạn chót hủy môn học (course drop) trong năm học 2026-2027.
